title: FareLegRule
description: A rule defining how a fare is applied to a single leg of a journey based on origin, destination, network, and time.

fareProductId.description: Identifier of the fare product this rule applies to

legGroupId.description: Leg group identifier for grouping related rules

networkId.description: Network to which this rule is restricted

fromAreaId.description: Origin tariff zone for this fare leg rule

toAreaId.description: Destination tariff zone for this fare leg rule

containsServiceId.description: Specific route this rule applies to

validity.description: Validity window for this policy version
